emails.subject: Australia & Japan
emails.body: Australia Japan The only online trading counterparty lists I am aware you see are the lists that originate from Houston Credit. London has their own lists of counterparties I never see. Do you think we need to get them to forward all lists with Japanese Australian counterparties to you and Jane for approval?

emails.subject: Re: Australia & Japan
emails.body: Re: Australia Japan I believe they already forward such companies to us From: Tana Jones@ECT on 01/11/2000 05:54 PM CDT
